title.en: Why CUE Works Well as a Configuration DSL

summary.en: A practical comparison of type constraints, reuse, validation, and multi-environment governance to explain why CUE is a strong fit for complex declarative configuration.
summary.zh: 从类型约束、复用能力、一致性校验与多环境配置治理几个维度，分析为什么 CUE 更适合作为复杂系统中的声明式配置 DSL。

readingDirection.en: Read this when evaluating configuration language choices, schema unification, or platform-level configuration engineering.
readingDirection.zh: 适合在评估配置语言选型、统一 Schema 与数据表达，或准备建设平台级配置工程体系时阅读。
